description_long: This is a large, elongated barn with a steeply pitched gable roof adorned with decorative end finials, reminiscent of traditional Scandinavian or Viking longhouses. The roof is covered with overlapping wooden shingles, giving it a rustic and weathered appearance. The exterior walls are clad in vertical wooden planks, creating a strong linear texture along the length of the structure. The front and rear facades feature prominent, wide barn doors with a cross-braced design, suggesting robust construction for agricultural use. There are no visible windows, emphasizing the utilitarian nature of the building. The barn sits on a rectangular patch of grass, further highlighting its rural and functional character.
description: A long, wooden barn with a steep gable roof, vertical plank siding, and large cross-braced doors, evoking a traditional Scandinavian longhouse style.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wide, cross-braced barn door and the decorative roof finial, with the steep gable roof extending back.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the full length of the barn, the continuous vertical plank siding, and the shingled gable roof.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, displaying another large barn door and matching roof finial.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the barn's length, vertical siding, and the uninterrupted shingled roof.
attribute_roof_type: steeply pitched gable roof with decorative end finials
attribute_door_style: double hinged barn doors with cross-bracing, one at each end
attribute_window_arrangement: no visible windows on any side
